3.story:
Blood and Stone Round 3 Wasteland Declaration — The Assault Begins

The war horns had barely faded from Round 2 when S2864 commanders convened at the war table. The sector map told a story of ambition unrealized — 36 wastelands held, ranked 22nd in the sector, score sitting at 6,800. Good. Not great. That changes now.

The opening salvos of Round 3 came fast. S2864 scouts identified soft flanks in S126's territory — a server stretched thin across contested ground. The order came down: strike. Three wastelands fell in quick succession, seized from S126 before their lines could consolidate. Two more came from the opportunistic assault on S2617, and isolated nodes held by S1257 and S2681 were swept clean. One unclaimed wasteland was quietly absorbed into the fold.

It was not without cost. In the chaos of the mid-round repositioning, Wasteland #352 slipped through the cracks — a defensive gap that hunger for expansion had created. One lost. Eight gained. A net of +7 wastelands secured.

When the dust settled, S2864 held 43 wastelands. Score climbed to 8,800 — +2,000 in a single round. Rank advanced to 21st. The war machine is moving. Neutral City Declaration comes next. The sector is watching.

3.5.story:
Thirteen Banners Fall Round 3.5 — Post-Battle Assessment — Neutral City Declaration Stage

Seventeen declarations. Twelve defensive commitments. Twenty-nine simultaneous fronts. When the dust cleared, S2864 had won thirteen and held eleven. The numbers tell a dominant story — but the ones that got away tell the rest of it.

S126 was everywhere. Five wastelands ripped from their grasp in our assault — the heaviest single-server losses in the sector this round. But they fought back hard. Two of our declared attacks on Wasteland #391 (Seal Stone Train) and Wasteland #373 (HP Buff, Lv. 3) were outrun by S126 columns arriving first. Then they hit our line: Wasteland #392 (Seal Stone Train) — our only defensive failure — fell to S126. Three outcomes on their ledger. They earned our attention.

The remaining two failed attacks — #222 and #276 — remain unclaimed, contested ground that neither side could secure. Four failures total. Four lessons. The other S2617, S1257, S2078, S2681, and S386 each yielded one wasteland without contest. Three unclaimed territories were absorbed quietly into the fold.

The final count: 55 wastelands held. Sector score 11,000 — +2,200 in a single phase. Rank 20. Three neutral cities secured: Lv. 2 #2016, Lv. 1 #1040, Lv. 1 #1046. Declarations filed on three more: #3008, #2008, #1060. The Neutral City stage is live. S2864 enters it battle-hardened and hungry.
